# WP Plugin Checkup

> Check a WordPress plugin list against WordPress.org for removed, abandoned, and untested plugins, right in the browser.

## Tool

- [WP Plugin Checkup](https://jaydenyoonzk.github.io/wp-plugin-checkup/): the tool itself, a static page that runs entirely in the browser with no accounts and no data collection

## Documentation

- [README](https://github.com/JaydenYoonZK/wp-plugin-checkup#readme): what the tool does, how it works, and its engineering notes
- [Changelog](https://github.com/JaydenYoonZK/wp-plugin-checkup/blob/main/CHANGELOG.md): dated release history

## Source

- [Repository](https://github.com/JaydenYoonZK/wp-plugin-checkup): MIT licensed source code
